body:
Update to ClimaCore v0.14.54. 

Code changes
- Update adjoint storage types, since the recent CC release changed the adjoint representation
- `g³³` helper function now calls new `reshape` rather than rebuilding from components
title: Test climacore refactor

body: Add a comment step to post preview links for pull requests. This is intended to be a more visible and easier to find alternative to scrolling through the (rather long) list of checks at the bottom of the PR.
title: ci: Add PR preview links as PR comment
